findings: Launcher seeds premium-model policy, banned-model list, telemetry files, and depth budget into commander state.
Teardown only updates top-level state.json and stops PIDs/tmux; it does not emit commander child stop/recovery telemetry into swarm-state.json or child-agents.jsonl.
An operator override can disable local gates, which weakens the documented partial-on-circuit-breaker failure policy.
